name: Spicy Thai Tofu Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Black sesame seeds, toasted and crushed
1/2 cup Fresh shiitake mushrooms (OR white button mushrooms), sliced
1 small Red bell pepper, sliced into thin strips
1 cup Fresh sugar snap peas (OR snow peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. PREP TIME: 15 Minutes MARINATING TIME: 30 Minutes
2. To make dressing, combine sesame seeds, oil, vinegar, tamari, honey, garlic, cilantro and red pepper flakes in a medium bowl, stirring until well-mixed.
3. Add tofu, shiitake, red bell pepper, snow peas and green onions to the dressing. Toss until coated.
4. Let marinate in refrigerator 30 minutes.
5. Divide spinach between four plates. Top with marinated tofu and vegetables and serve.
